summary: A Fox News broadcast clip of Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer speaking at a White House cabinet meeting, under a 'TRUMP CABINET WEIGHS IN ON FIRST 100 DAYS OF TERM' chyron, stating there have been 80,000 new apprenticeships since January. It is TV news footage with no music track. On-screen text reads 'THE WHITE HOUSE LIVE', 'FOX NEWS BREAKING NEWS', 'LORI CHAVEZ-DEREMER | LABOR SECRETARY', and 'TRUMP CABINET WEIGHS IN ON FIRST 100 DAYS OF TERM'.
notable_text: THE WHITE HOUSE LIVE; FOX NEWS BREAKING NEWS; LORI CHAVEZ-DEREMER | LABOR SECRETARY; TRUMP CABINET WEIGHS IN ON FIRST 100 DAYS OF TERM
